# IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode

**Enumeration**

These constants specify the display mode used by the camera view. These constants are used by [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceView/mode].

## Declaration

```swift
@frozen enum IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode
```

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode.table**: Display the devices in as a table.
- **IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode.icon**: Display the devices as icons.

## Enumeration Cases

- **IKCameraDeviceViewDisplayMode.none**

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Constants

- **IKCameraDeviceViewTransferMode**: These constants specify the transfer mode used by the camera view. These constants are used by [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceView/mode].

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
